ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "economic_indicator" TEXT /* Key economic indicator (e.g., GDP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the region belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the region */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date in the format YYYY-MM-DD */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number of the year */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy intervention */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country implementing the policy */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date the policy was implemented */,
  "C1_school_closing" INTEGER /* School closing policy (0-1) */,
  "C2_workplace_closing" INTEGER /* Workplace closing policy (0-1) */,
  "C3_cancel_public_events" INTEGER /* Cancel public events policy (0-1) */,
  "C4_restrictions_on_gatherings" INTEGER /* Restrictions on gatherings policy (0-1) */,
  "C5_close_public_transport" INTEGER /* Close public transport policy (0-1) */,
  "C6_stay_at_home_requirements" INTEGER /* Stay at home requirements policy (0-1) */,
  "C7_restrictions_on_internal_movement" INTEGER /* Restrictions on internal movement policy (0-1) */,
  "C8_international_travel_controls" INTEGER /* International travel controls policy (0-1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the policy */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "effectiveness_score" INTEGER /* Effectiveness score of the policy */,
  "compliance_rate" INTEGER /* Compliance rate of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_interventions_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_interventions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_interventions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date the data was imported */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the imported data file */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import */,
  "imported_by" TEXT /* User who imported the data */,
  "imported_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of data imported in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
